channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Brock Purdy's elbow was 'on fire' after hit but he says his surgically repaired ligament is fine
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy hurt his surgically repaired throwing elbow late in a loss to the Detroit Lions on Monday night, the latest blow in an injury-plagued season for the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Warriors bludgeoned by Cavaliers to enter New Year
item.description: The Warriors looked like they were nowhere close to being in the same league as the first-place Cavaliers.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Tennessee remains No. 1 following quiet week in AP Top 25, No. 15 UCLA climbs 7 spots
item.description: Tennessee remains No. 1 after a quiet holiday week in the AP Top 25. The Volunteers received 41 first-place votes from a 61-person media panel in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released Monday. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Five things to know for the Blues-Blackhawks Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: On his 40th, LeBron James says he could play "another 5 or 7 years." He won't stay around that long
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James celebrated his 40th birthday on Monday with gratitude for his basketball longevity and optimism about his future with the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs with Bowles thanks a near-perfect offensive day, and a duck, for the team's return to first place
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned to the top of the NFC South on Sunday with a dominating 48-14 win over the Carolina Panthers, paired with a loss by the Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gonzaga men's basketball charter nearly collides with departing Delta flight in scary scene at LAX
item.description: The Gonzaga men's basketball team's charter plane was almost demolished by a Delta flight taking off at LAX on Friday, leading to an FAA investigation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FBI warns South American crime groups targeting star athletes in burglaries: report
item.description: The robberies of the homes of some of the most famous athletes in the U.S., including Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes, are reportedly led by South American crime groups.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Riley Leonard's passing game improvement key for Notre Dame in CFP quarterfinal against Georgia
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — When quarterback Riley Leonard transferred from Duke to Notre Dame for the 2024 season, he immediately went to work building chemistry with his new teammates. He brought six Fighting Irish receivers to his home in Fairhope, Ala.
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 31 points to propel No. 4 Southern California past No. 23 Michigan 78-58
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 31 points, making 13 of 14 free throws, and No. 4 Southern California beat No. 23 Michigan 78-58 on Sunday night in the Trojans’ Big Ten home opener. Watkins had five rebounds, seven assists, three steals and three blocks.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Finland beats US 4-3 in OT in world junior hockey; Canada rebounds from loss to top Germany 3-0
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Tuomas Uronen scored at 1:46 of overtime to give Finland a 4-3 victory over the defending champion United States on Sunday in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former NCAA quarterback Tommy Lazzaro dies in 'tragic' accident at US Air Force base
item.description: Tommy Lazzaro, an Army sergeant and former quarterback for the Central Michigan Chippewas, has died following an accident at Eglin Air Force Base in Florida. He was 27.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Holiday Bowl football players visit SeaWorld San Diego
item.description: Football players from the two teams facing off in the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl spent a few hours Wednesday morning celebrating Christmas at SeaWorld San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark raised the profile of women's basketball to unprecedented levels in both the college ranks and the WNBA, and Tuesday she was named the AP Female Athlete of the Year for her impact on and off the court.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9
